title: Status
text: Status Determines whether the status data processing attribute is added for the selected entity node in the DTD tree. This attribute holds the occurrence modification state. It can be set or inspected using $occstatus . Valid values are True or False (default). Description If Disconnected Record Set is True , Status is also set to True . Applies To DTD Entity Related Links $occstatus Returns the modification status for each disconnected occurrence in a component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
